message:
feat: add --rig flag to bd list and bd ready for cross-rig queries

Extends prefix routing to list/ready commands so users can query other
rigs without cd-ing into them (e.g., `bd ready --rig gt`, `bd list --rig hq`).

Closes bd-rgdjr

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
